options.name: -ignore_floating_nets
options.description: Ignores nets without drivers, power, and ground nets

options.name: -ignore_tied_low_high_net_arcs
options.description: Ignores timing arcs of power and ground nets

options.name: -ignore_tied_low_high_nets
options.description: Ignores nets connected to tied_low and tied_high cells

options.name: -list_annotated
options.description: Lists detailed annotation information for the following annotated arcs

options.name: -list_non_annotated
options.description: Lists the arc information for the non-annotated arcs corresponding to the following types of arcs

options.name: -max_missing
options.description: Limits the number of missing annotations to the number specified

options.name: -missing_capacitances
options.description: Reports the nets that are missing capacitances

options.name: -missing_delays
options.description: Reports the arcs that are missing SDF annotations

options.name: -missing_rc
options.description: Reports the nets that are missing resistances and capacitances

options.name: -missing_resistances
options.description: Reports the nets that are missing resistances

options.name: -missing_spf
options.description: Reports the nets that are missing SPF data

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -view
options.description: Reports the coverage of annotations for the specified analysis view (string, optional) > <filename> # Writes the report to the specified file name. If the file already exists, the software overwrites it
